prompt: Generate a painting of the bellary heritage site.
prompt_refined: Generate a painting of the Bellary heritage site, referencing image 1. The image should depict a prominent open-air structure composed of light-colored stone pillars with decorative carvings and horizontal beams. In the immediate foreground, a wide, dark paved area leads to a raised stone platform with green grass and a rectangular stone seating area on the left. Lush green trees and bushes, along with patches of flowering plants, are visible in the background, behind and to the left of the stone structure, all under a clear sky.
objects: Light-colored stone pillars with decorative carvings
Wide, dark paved area in immediate foreground
Green grass on raised stone platform
Rectangular stone seating area on the left
Lush green trees in the background
Bushes and patches of flowering plants in the background
